meta.title: Weakness at the Boundaries - Cisco Sponsor Session
meta.description: Robert Albach, who is responsible for the Industrial Security Products at Cisco, took a broad network architecture with Cloud, HQ, DMZ and Factory Zones and then mapped recent attacks on ICS to this architecture. Showing what the attackers did and how they could have been stopped at various boundaries.
